mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup_record ORDER BY exam_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup_record WHERE name = #{name} ORDER BY exam_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_health_checkup_record (exam_date, exam_period, hospital_name, department, name, age, bp_systolic, bp_diastolic, bp_med, bp_grade, bst, dm_med, dm_grade, tc, tg, ldl, hdl, lipid_med, lipid_grade, follow_up, work_fitness, remark, pdf_file_id, created_by, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{examDate}, #{examPeriod}, #{hospitalName}, #{department}, #{name}, #{age}, #{bpSystolic}, #{bpDiastolic}, #{bpMed}, #{bpGrade}, #{bst}, #{dmMed}, #{dmGrade}, #{tc}, #{tg}, #{ldl}, #{hdl}, #{lipidMed}, #{lipidGrade}, #{followUp}, #{workFitness}, #{remark}, #{pdfFileId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_health_checkup_record SET exam_date = #{examDate}, exam_period = #{examPeriod}, hospital_name = #{hospitalName}, department = #{department}, name = #{name}, age = #{age}, bp_systolic = #{bpSystolic}, bp_diastolic = #{bpDiastolic}, bp_med = #{bpMed}, bp_grade = #{bpGrade}, bst = #{bst}, dm_med = #{dmMed}, dm_grade = #{dmGrade}, tc = #{tc}, tg = #{tg}, ldl = #{ldl}, hdl = #{hdl}, lipid_med = #{lipidMed}, lipid_grade = #{lipidGrade}, follow_up = #{followUp}, work_fitness = #{workFitness}, remark = #{remark}, pdf_file_id = #{pdfFileId}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
